treasury.text: And unleavened bread, and cakes unleavened tempered with oil, and wafers unleavened anointed with oil: of wheaten flour shalt thou make them…

treasury.label: Exodus 35:14
treasury.text: The candlestick also for the light, and his furniture, and his lamps, with the oil for the light,

treasury.label: Leviticus 2:1
treasury.text: And when any will offer a meat offering unto the LORD, his offering shall be of fine flour; and he shall pour oil upon it, and put frankincense thereon:

treasury.label: Job 1:7
treasury.text: And the LORD said unto Satan, Whence comest thou? Then Satan answered the LORD, and said, From going to and fro in the earth, and from walking up and down in it.

treasury.label: Job 2:2
treasury.text: And the LORD said unto Satan, From whence comest thou? And Satan answered the LORD, and said, From going to and fro in the earth, and from walking up and down in it.
